splont_start.text: I’m here for an elixir, is it in stock? If so, then give it to me.

splont_start_answer1.text: Ooh, this one’s zesty! I think I’ll just take a potion. Like, without paying. Names Splont by the way. *Spores pour out of his pores, and the spores surround a potion and carry it to him as he leaves, without paying* (L +0.3, you receive no money)

splont_start_answer2.text: *he stares blankly, blinks, and then turns around and leaves after straining his brain too much* (L + 0, receives no money)

splont_start_answer3.text: Response:  Sweet, man. Consider yourself a friendgus of the fungus. My names  (L + 0.1, receives _ money)

splont_start_answer4.text: Response: dude.. I dunno either dude.. That’s really deep bro… I like you. (L+ 0.35, receives a small tip of _, but you don’t sell any potions)
